title: ASO Datalake Power BI Model
summary: A structured Power BI model supporting PSTN inventory cleansing, site matching, and transition planning.
context: Legacy telecoms data needed to be cleaned, matched, and made usable for ASO planning.
role: Led the data modelling approach and shaped the reporting structure.
outcome: Created a reusable model connecting sites, users, devices, numbers, functions, and property reference data.
